name: Missing Tests PR Reviewer
shortDescription: Flags code changes that likely require but lack corresponding tests.
longDescription: Maps changed production files to expected test files and reports likely missing test coverage before merge.
author: ARS QA

inputs.name: changed_files
inputs.description: List of changed source files from PR.

includedAssets.name: scripts/detect_missing_tests.py
includedAssets.description: Maps changed source files to expected test filenames and flags gaps.

includedAssets.name: references/test-mapping-rules.md
includedAssets.description: Heuristics for mapping source paths to expected test files.

includedAssets.name: references/exemption-policy.md
includedAssets.description: Rules for documenting justified test-gap exemptions.

failureModes: Heuristic mapping may miss non-standard test organization.
Shared integration tests may satisfy coverage implicitly.
Excess false positives can reduce reviewer trust.

examples.title: Service change missing test
examples.summary: Detects changed source file without corresponding test update.

changelog.summary: Initial release for missing-test detection in PR reviews.
